short_version_body: AskBiz POS uses minimal, essential storage only. We do not run advertising cookies, and we currently use no third-party analytics or tracking. There is nothing to opt out of — only the storage needed to keep you signed in and let the app work.
row_staff_purpose: Keeps your staff sign-in session active
row_consent_purpose: Remembers you dismissed the privacy notice
row_offline_purpose: Stores cash sales during connectivity loss
no_analytics_body_1: We do not use Google Analytics, advertising pixels, or any third-party tracking cookies in the POS. We do not sell data or share it with advertisers. Because the only storage we use is strictly necessary to deliver the service you asked for, consent is not required for it under the ePrivacy / PECR rules — but we still show a notice so you know what is happening.
no_analytics_body_2: If we ever add optional analytics, we will update this page and add a proper accept/reject control before any such storage is set.
managing_storage_body: You can clear this storage at any time by signing out of the POS or clearing your browser’s site data. Clearing it will sign you out and may discard any unsynced offline sales.
more_info_body_after: for full detail on the data we process, or contact privacy@askbiz.co.
